vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô lượn sóng
vocab.example: I would relish the chance to wander across the undulating hills of Tuscany, admiring the seamless blend of nature and agriculture.

vocab.meaning: sự đô thị hóa dàn trải (thường dùng để đối lập với nơi muốn đi dạo)
vocab.example: I yearn to escape the suffocating urban sprawl and find a path that leads deep into an ancient, silent woodland.

vocab.meaning: sự thanh bình vô song / không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: Walking along the shores of a remote Himalayan lake would offer a sense of unrivalled serenity that is impossible to find in a city.

vocab.meaning: vùng ngoại ô xanh mướt (nhiều cây cối)
vocab.example: If I had a free afternoon, I'd enjoy a leisurely trek through the leafy suburbs of London, exploring the hidden historical architecture.

vocab.meaning: địa hình gồ ghề, hiểm trở
vocab.example: I've always been drawn to the challenge of traversing rugged terrain, perhaps along the rocky cliffs of the Irish coast.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: Taking a long walk through a dense, foggy forest provides a profound sense of escapism from my daily responsibilities.
I’m quite keen on maritime scenery, so a long stroll along a pier or a coastal boardwalk would be right up my alley.

vocab.meaning: đậm chất lịch sử / bề dày lịch sử
vocab.example: I would love to hike along the Great Wall of China, a structure that is truly steeped in history and ancient lore.

vocab.meaning: đi bộ một cách mệt nhọc nhưng kiên trì (thường trên tuyết hoặc bùn)
vocab.example: There is something oddly satisfying about having to trudge through deep snow in a quiet, wintery landscape.

vocab.meaning: màu xanh tươi mướt của cây cỏ
vocab.example: The sheer vibrant verdure of the rainforest would make a long expedition there a visually stunning experience.
